title: Gold Remastered
description: Overhauls all of minecraft's gold items, blocks and armor to a darker, more realistic style
body:
![Midas Gold Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dc86dfac161e97a8e5f679a647c3de25e17fb07.png)

# **About**
A vanilla style overhaul of minecraft's gold items, blocks and armor to a darker, more realistic style. With an animated texture for enchanted golden apples.

Confirmed compatibility with 1.20.1 - 1.21.5. Should be compatible for lower versions up to 1.14.

# **Showcase**
![Items Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833577f3d12836023e1f282cffa1e07b2285f57d.png)
![Blocks & Effect Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1070b2e8cfaff08129eeb2a0624af0f0367b136c.png)

![Enchanted Golden Apple Animated Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/261e2eebf739eb6a5a7b341cb8ace47484f7e882.gif)

# **Other Projects**

**Gold Remastered / Midas Gold:**
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/midas_gold) | [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gold-remastered) | [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/midas-gold/)
- A Texturepack overhauling Minecraft's Gold Textures.

**Combat Rebalance:**
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat_rebalance) | [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/combat-rebalance)
- A Highly Configurable Rebalance to part of minecraft's Combat. (Hunger, Ender Pearls, Trident, Mace)

**Calamity MC:**
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mc-calamity) | [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/calamity-sn) | [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/terraria-calamity-in-minecraft/)
- A Datapack recreating the Terraria Calamity Mod in Minecraft.
